hook_en: Did you know fresh ginger can do this? 📈
hook_es: ¿Sabías que el jengibre fresco puede hacer esto? 📈
key_message: Fresh ginger contains gingerol, which reduces nausea, inflammation, and muscle pain. Grating releases more gingerol.
visual_elements: Close-up of fresh ginger being grated
Time-lapse of ginger tea being made
Finished ginger tea with a steaming effect
_source_food_context: • INGREDIENT: Ginger — Contains gingerol — proven to reduce nausea, inflammation, and muscle pain (Tip: Fresh ginger is more potent than dried — grate it to release more gingerol)

title_es: Jengibre: Duelo Entre Fresco y Seco
hook_en: Fresh or dried ginger? Which packs a punch? 🥊
hook_es: ¿Jengibre fresco o seco? ¿Cuál es más potente? 🥊
key_message: Fresh ginger is more potent than dried because it contains more gingerol, enhancing its health benefits.
visual_elements: Side-by-side comparison of fresh and dried ginger
Dried ginger being sprinkled into a dish
_source_food_context: • INGREDIENT: Ginger — Contains gingerol — proven to reduce nausea, inflammation, and muscle pain (Tip: Fresh ginger is more potent than dried — grate it to release more gingerol)
